# T-Tests: Part #2

## Key Concepts

- Normal Distribution
- Variance, Standard Deviation
- Probability Values
- Cut-Off Points

## Key Formulas

$$t = \frac{M_1 - M_2}{s_p\sqrt{\dfrac{1}{n_1} + \dfrac{1}{n_2}}}$$

$$s_p^2 = \frac{SS_1 + SS_2}{df_1 + df_2}$$

$$df = N_{total} - 2$$

## Code Examples

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(palmerpenguins)
library(tidyverse)

two_species <- penguins |>
  filter(species %in% c("Adelie", "Chinstrap")) |>
  drop_na(flipper_length_mm)

t.test(flipper_length_mm ~ species, data = two_species, var.equal = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
penguins |>
  filter(species %in% c("Adelie", "Chinstrap")) |>
  drop_na(flipper_length_mm) |>
  group_by(species) |>
  summarise(M = mean(flipper_length_mm), SD = sd(flipper_length_mm), n = n())
```
